S.FORM: Keegan Allen kawas tay 1987, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 7, Keegan Allen, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Keegan Allen kawas tay 1987, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 7, Keegan Allen, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: keeɣan allen kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, keeɣan allen, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
